---
title: "Posts"
description: "Notes on statistics, research, teaching, and side projects."
page-layout: full
toc: false
aliases:
  - /posts/
listing:
  id: all-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
  page-size: 15
---

::: {#all-posts}
:::
